headline: Quality Investing Spotlight: A.O. Smith Corp (NYSE:AOS) Passes the "Caviar Cruise" Screen
summary: A.O. Smith exemplifies quality investing: high returns on capital, strong profit quality, low debt, and profitable expansion, making it a durable buy-and-hold candidate.
